component.name: GerberCAM
component.summary: View Gerber PCB files and generate isolation routing G-code

description.p: GerberCAM reads RS-274X Gerber files and Excellon drill files, displays copper layers and board outlines, and generates isolation routing and drill G-code for CNC milling of printed circuit boards.

ul.li: Open and overlay multiple Gerber copper layers
Load board outline (edge cut) Gerber files
Automatic net identification and collision detection
Export G-code for engraving, drilling, boring, and outline cutting
Configurable tool library with conical, cylindrical, and drill bits
Save and load projects as JSON
Board flip (mirror) support for double-sided PCBs

description.p: Initial Flatpak release with outline support, Excellon drill import, project save/load, and outline G-code export.
